site.title: Benjamin Nößler — Web presence & digital · Vienna
site.description: I help small Austrian businesses with their website, online booking, newsletter, and the digital stuff around it — built, maintained, reachable. Focus on hotels and restaurants.

hero.headline: The digital side of your business.
hero.body: I help small businesses with their website and the digital stuff around it — built, maintained, reachable. Focus: hotels and restaurants.

services.label: Services
services.intro: I build websites for small businesses — and take care of what comes after. Plus the digital tools around it: booking, newsletter, invoicing. Often for hotels, guesthouses and restaurants.
services.taxNote: All prices VAT-exempt — Austrian small-business scheme (§6(1)(27) UStG); no VAT is added.

website.title: Website
website.description: A new website built from scratch — or an existing site rebuilt. One-pager or multi-page, depending on scope. Clear structure, fast load times, proper bilingual DE/EN.
includedItems: SEO foundation (meta tags, sitemap, structured data)

care.title: Operation & care
care.description: The site keeps running on my infrastructure in Vienna — hosting, updates, backups, small changes. A fixed monthly fee, one point of contact, cancel any time. You don't have to think about it.
care.priceCadence: /month · cancel any time at month's end
includedItems: Hosting on owned infrastructure in Vienna · SSL · daily backups
Reachable when something breaks — response within one business day
care.note: Larger changes billed by the hour: €60/h (in 15-minute increments). SEO, monthly reports and an annual strategy call available on request.

tools.title: Digital tools
tools.description: Booking, scheduling, newsletter, invoicing — many businesses pay monthly third-party fees or steep commissions for these. I set up the right open-source tools and run them on owned infrastructure. Your data stays with you.
examples: Direct booking for hotels & guesthouses — instead of 15–20 % commission
Online scheduling — instead of phone calls and sticky notes
Newsletter — without the monthly subscription trap
tools.note: Scope and price defined after a call — usually as part of the Operation & care package.

fullstack.title: Fullstack web apps
fullstack.description: For projects beyond a single page — web apps, dashboards, APIs, internal tools. Cleanly built, transparently deployed on owned infrastructure. Scope and price defined after a call.

fromEmployment.label: From employment
fromEmployment.intro: Selected projects from my permanent role — for context, not as a freelance portfolio.

steps.title: Talk
steps.body: 30 minutes, free. I tell you honestly whether I'm a fit.

steps.title: Fixed-price quote
steps.body: Clear scope, clear price. No hidden hours.

steps.title: Build & ongoing care
steps.body: Launch in 2–4 weeks. Then hosting and care from one hand.

about.label: About
metaItems: Permanent role · City of Vienna digital team (via APC Business Services)
Freelance · web & digital for small businesses
bodyParagraphs: I help small Austrian businesses get visible online and stay that way — and take over the digital stuff a business would otherwise have to handle on the side. Most often for hotels, guesthouses and restaurants.
My day job is on the City of Vienna's digital team; on the side I've been building web apps and my own projects for years. On most things I stay on as the point of contact after launch.
about.moreLabel: More about me — background, work history and the technical part

aboutPage.title: About me
aboutPage.description: Benjamin Nößler — background, work history and the technical part. Fullstack developer based in Vienna, day job on the City of Vienna's digital team, freelance for small businesses on the side.
aboutPage.lede: Day job on the City of Vienna's digital team, freelance for small businesses on the side — website, operation, and the digital tools around it.
bodyParagraphs: I help small Austrian businesses get visible online and stay that way: build or rebuild the website, then take over operation and care, plus the digital tools around it — booking, newsletter, invoicing. Focus: hotels and restaurants.
I've been building web apps for years in employment and in my own projects (e.g. b-cal); on the freelance side I'm deliberately starting with a smaller scope and scope larger projects together.

I prefer projects meant to last longer than a quarter: cleanly built, on my own infrastructure in Vienna, with tools I'll still trust in two years. On most projects I stay on as the point of contact after launch.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Tell me about your project.
contact.body: Send me a few sentences about your project. I usually reply within 48 hours.

noscript.before: JavaScript is required for this form. You can email me directly at

form.projectTypeHint: Not sure? Pick 'Something else' — we'll sort it out in the call.
form.messagePlaceholder: What's this about? A few sentences about the project, the current page, or your audience is perfect.
form.errorBody: Please try again or email me directly at benjamin@noessler.at.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.messageTooShort: Your message should be at least 20 characters.

footer.builtWith: Built with Astro · Hosted on Hetzner

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.description: Imprint as required under §5 of the Austrian E-Commerce Act and §25 of the Austrian Media Act.

privacy.description: Information on the processing of personal data on this website.
